Sandbox_PsychopatzNPCCore.EnableWeaponDa: Uses each NPC's equipped weapon damage and combat skill. Disable to use legacy combat-profile damage values.
Sandbox_PsychopatzNPCCore.NPCDamageDealt: Scales weapon-based damage dealt by PNC NPCs. 1.0 is normal and 0 prevents weapon-based damage.
Sandbox_PsychopatzNPCCore.NPCPlayerWound: Allows PNC NPC attacks to cause pain, scratches, and bleeding on players in addition to overall health loss.
Sandbox_PsychopatzNPCCore.NPCAmmoConsump: Requires ranged PNC NPCs to carry the firearm's ammunition in their virtual inventory and consumes one round per resolved shot.
Sandbox_PsychopatzNPCCore.NPCWeaponCondi: Allows equipped PNC NPC weapons to lose virtual condition when attacks hit.
